languages.text: "Конечно, Лорд-капитан. Судя по всему, речь идет не о полномасштабном вторжении — скорее об ударах отдельных отрядов. О космической блокаде не сообщается. Чартист так же передал странные данные о том, что враги Человечества выкованы из металла и одеты в гниющую плоть... но я не уверена, что этой части сообщения можно вообще доверять".

"Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not reporting a full-scale invasion, more like strikes by individual squads. And there are no reports of a void blockade. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."
languages.original_text: "Конечно, Лорд-капитан. Судя по всему, речь идет не о полномасштабном вторжении — скорее об ударах отдельных отрядов. О космической блокаде не сообщается. Чартист так же передал странные данные о том, что враги Человечества выкованы из металла и одеты в гниющую плоть... но я не уверена, что этой части сообщения можно вообще доверять".

traits.locale_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not requesting a full-scale invasion, but rather something like strikes by individual squads. There are no reports of a void blockade. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."

"Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not requesting a full-scale invasion, more like strikes by individual squads. And there are no reports of a void blockade. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."

"Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not requesting a full-scale invasion, but rather something like strikes by individual squads. There are no reports of a void blockade or any voidcraft manoeuvres. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."

"Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not requesting a full-scale invasion, but rather something like strikes by individual squads. There are no reports of a void blockade. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."

"Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not requesting a full-scale invasion, more like strikes by individual squads. And there are no reports of a void blockade. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."

"Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not reporting a full-scale invasion, more like strikes by individual squads. And there are no reports of a void blockade. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."

languages.text: 「もちろん、艦長。ザルコフは全面的な侵攻を要求しているのではなく、小隊による奇襲のようなものだと思われます。虚無封鎖や虚無艦の機動に関する報告はありません。また、チャリストから、腐敗した肉で覆われた金属製の敵に関する奇妙な報告も伝えられました。しかし、その部分は全く信用できないかもしれません」
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not requesting a full-scale invasion, but rather something like strikes by individual squads. There are no reports of a void blockade or any voidcraft manoeuvres. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."

languages.text: "Elbette Lord Kaptan. Görünüşe göre Zarkov, topyekûn bir işgalden ziyade ayrı manga saldırıları gibi bir şey bildiriyor. Uçsuz ablukasına dair rapor yok. Ayrıca Haritacı, metalden dövülmüş ve çürüyen etlere bürünmüş İnsanlık düşmanlarına dair tuhaf raporlar da iletti... Ancak mesajın o kısmına ne kadar güvenilebileceğinden emin değilim."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not reporting a full-scale invasion, more like strikes by individual squads. And there are no reports of a void blockade. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."

traits.locale_text: "Elbette Lord Kaptan. Görünüşe göre Zarkov, topyekûn bir işgalden ziyade ayrı manga saldırıları gibi bir şey bildiriyor. Uçsuz ablukasına dair rapor yok. Ayrıca Haritacı, metalden dövülmüş ve çürüyen etlere bürünmüş İnsanlık düşmanlarına dair tuhaf raporlar da iletti... Ancak mesajın o kısmına ne kadar güvenilebileceğinden emin değilim."

languages.text: “遵命，舰长大人。看起来扎尔科夫报告的并非全面进攻，更像是小队规模的精准打击。目前还未有封锁虚空航线的报告。宪章船长还转达了关于敌人的诡异描述：它们是由金属铸造、覆盖着腐肉的人类之敌……但我认为这部分信息的可信度存疑。”
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not reporting a full-scale invasion, more like strikes by individual squads. And there are no reports of a void blockade. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."

traits.locale_text: “遵命，舰长大人。看起来扎尔科夫报告的并非全面进攻，更像是小队规模的精准打击。目前还未有封锁虚空航线的报告。宪章船长还转达了关于敌人的诡异描述：它们是由金属铸造、覆盖着腐肉的人类之敌……但我认为这部分信息的可信度存疑。”

languages.text: "Natürlich, Lord Captain. Offenbar meldet Zarkov keine groß angelegte Invasion, sondern gezielte Schläge gegen einzelne Trupps. Und es gibt keine Berichte über eine Leerenblockade. Der Chartist hat außerdem Berichte über Feinde der Menschheit weitergeleitet, die aus Metall geschmiedet und von verfaultem Fleisch umhüllt sind ... aber ich bin mir nicht sicher, ob dieser Teil der Nachricht glaubwürdig ist."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not reporting a full-scale invasion, more like strikes by individual squads. And there are no reports of a void blockade. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich, Lord Captain. Offenbar meldet Zarkov keine groß angelegte Invasion, sondern gezielte Schläge gegen einzelne Trupps. Und es gibt keine Berichte über eine Leerenblockade. Der Chartist hat außerdem Berichte über Feinde der Menschheit weitergeleitet, die aus Metall geschmiedet und von verfaultem Fleisch umhüllt sind ... aber ich bin mir nicht sicher, ob dieser Teil der Nachricht glaubwürdig ist."

languages.text: « Bien sûr, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Zarkov ne demande pas l'envoi de troupes d'invasion à grande échelle, mais le déploiement d'équipes d'intervention restreintes pour mener à bien des frappes ciblées. Aucun blocus planétaire n'a été signalé dans le secteur. Le cartographe nous a également transmis d'étranges rapports mentionnant des ennemis de l'humanité composés de métal forgé recouvert de chairs putréfiées... mais je ne suis pas sûre que l'on puisse prendre cette partie du message pour argent comptant. »
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not reporting a full-scale invasion, more like strikes by individual squads. And there are no reports of a void blockade. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."

traits.locale_text: « Bien sûr, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Zarkov ne demande pas l'envoi de troupes d'invasion à grande échelle, mais le déploiement d'équipes d'intervention restreintes pour mener à bien des frappes ciblées. Aucun blocus planétaire n'a été signalé dans le secteur. Le cartographe nous a également transmis d'étranges rapports mentionnant des ennemis de l'humanité composés de métal forgé recouvert de chairs putréfiées... mais je ne suis pas sûre que l'on puisse prendre cette partie du message pour argent comptant. »

languages.text: «Por supuesto, Lord Capitán. Al parecer, Zarkov no informa de una invasión a gran escala, sino de incursiones de escuadrones aislados. No mencionan ningún bloqueo del vacío. El cartista también transmitió informes extraños sobre enemigos de la Humanidad hechos de metal, ataviados con carne putrefacta... aunque esa parte del mensaje es más que dudosa».
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not reporting a full-scale invasion, more like strikes by individual squads. And there are no reports of a void blockade. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."
